name: DCASE 2024 Task 2 — Acoustic Anomaly Detection
description: Single-channel audio recordings of industrial machines under normal and abnormal operating conditions. Includes source and target domains to evaluate robustness under domain shift.

train.note: Training uses ONLY normal samples from source domain.

important_notes: Never use test labels to tune any threshold.
Keep source and target domains strictly separated in training.
Anomalies appear ONLY in test split — do not leak them into train.

creative_addition.name: Machine Type Recognition
creative_addition.description: A multi-task CNN head simultaneously classifies the machine type. This forces the shared encoder to learn type-specific representations, improving anomaly score discriminability per machine.
